message:
test: add HelpLayout, FinalCtaSection, ThemeToggle, RatingFilter tests

37 new tests covering help center layout (breadcrumbs, sidebar
categories, search, contact links, ArticleCard, ArticleContent),
landing page final CTA (headline, links, CLI install), theme toggle
(cycling, ARIA labels, sr-only text), and rating filter (options,
onChange, disabled state).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
